No. PNGRB/M(C)/62/2014.—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 61 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board Act, 2006 (19 of 2006), the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board hereby makes the following regulations, namely:- 1. Short title and commencement. (1) These regulations may be called the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determination of Petroleum and Petroleum Products Pipeline Transportation Tariff) Amendment Regulations, 2014. (2) They shall come into force on 20th December, 2014. 2. Amendment of regulations 4 and 5. In the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determination of Petroleum and Petroleum Products Pipeline Transportation Tariff) Regulations, 2010, — fa) in regulation 4, after the second proviso, the following proviso shall be added, namely:- “Provided also that the transitional period may, after the completion of the extended transition period of two years. be further extended for another two years or lesser period as the Board may decide;” (by in regulation 5, after the first proviso, the following proviso shall be added, namely:~ “Provided further that the determination of the petroleum and petroleum product pipeline transportation tariff shal! be benchmarked against the goods tariff table of the railways as applicable on the date of the coming into force of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determination of Petroleum and Petroleum Products Pipeline Transportation Tariff) Amendment Regulations, 2014 and if the goods tariff table of the railways is revised during the further extended period of transition, the Board may consider and decide the benchmarking of the petroleum and petroleum praducts transportation tariff against such revision.” K. RAJESWARA RAO, OSD (R) [ADVT.-IIT/4/Exty./188°14(230)| Foot Note: Principal regulations were notified vide GSR 987(E) dated 20-12-2010 and subsequently amended vide Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part I!]—Section 4 notification number F. No. PNGRB/M(C)/62/2012 dated 13.12.2012.
